title: September 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 9''' is the 252nd day of the year (253rd in leap years). There are 113 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Edward Hibbert]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Anastasia Heonis]] is born.
*1971 – [[Henry Thomas]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Adam James]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Brian Dobson]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Austin Wintory]] is born.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Insider 152|''Star Wars Insider'' 152]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Marvel Comics]]' ''[[Star Wars: Shattered Empire]]'' miniseries launches with the publication of [[Shattered Empire 1|''Shattered Empire'' 1]].
*2015 – [[Darth Vader (2015) 9|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 9]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 9|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 9]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2024]] – [[James Earl Jones]] dies.
*2024 – [[John Cassaday]] dies.
